title: NullShade
description: NullShade removes all block and entity shading, making Minecraft bright, clean
body:
🌌 NullShade – Absolute Brightness, Zero Shadows

NullShade transforms Minecraft into a clean, fully illuminated world by removing all block and entity shading. Every texture appears bright, crisp, and evenly lit — making your builds, landscapes, and PvP arenas shine with unmatched clarity.
Note : If you see notificat
This pack is designed for players who value visibility, simplicity, and performance. With no dark gradients or shadow overlays, your world feels smoother, lighter, and easier to navigate. Whether you’re fighting opponents, building massive projects, or exploring caves, NullShade ensures you see every detail clearly.

⚠️ Note for Sodium Users

If you see a notification saying “This resource pack is incompatible” when using Sodium, don’t worry — this is just a false warning caused by a Sodium bug.

NullShade works perfectly fine with Sodium and other performance mods.
You can safely ignore that message and continue using the pack without any issues. ✅

✨ Key Features

● Completely removes all block and entity shading

● Delivers a bright, consistent lighting experience 

● Enhances visibility in all dimensions

● Lightweight and optimized for maximum FPS

● Perfect for PvP, survival, and creative play

Compatible with performance mods like Sodium, Iris, and OptiFine alternatives

⚠️ Disclaimer 

NullShade is a refined visual enhancement pack inspired by OptiFine’s internal shader.
